concept.conceptName: Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration
Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration
Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine by Test strip
Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip

en.name: Urinary creatinine
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Urinary creatinine is the concentration of creatinine in a urine specimen — typically a spot (random) urine sample. It is often used as a denominator to normalise other urinary analytes (e.g. albumin-to-creatinine ratio) [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser or a urine test strip. Results are reported as a substance concentration in mmol/L (SI unit) or as a mass concentration in mg/dL [2]. ## Included Concepts The set lists six LOINC "Lab Test" concepts measuring the creatinine concentration in a spot urine specimen: - *3009508 / 14683-7 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine (LOINC)*: spot (random) urine sample, SI form. Most widely used LOINC code. - *3017250 / 2161-8 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Urine (LOINC)*: spot urine sample, mass concentration form. - *40758722 / 55593-8 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration (LOINC)*: used when the source does not specify whether the sample is spot or timed. - *3037052 / 35674-1 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration (LOINC)*: same as `55593-8` expressed as mass concentration. - *3019491 / 30002-0 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine by Test strip (LOINC)*: dipstick / test strip measurement. - *3003447 / 30004-6 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip (LOINC)*: same as `30002-0` expressed as mass concentration. **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`mmol/L`** (concept 8753 — millimole per litre) for `[Moles/volume]` codes and **`mg/dL`** (concept 8840) for `[Mass/volume]` codes. Conversion: `1 mg/dL ≈ 0.0884 mmol/L`. ## Excluded Concepts The following LOINC concepts that exist for urinary creatinine are deliberately not part of this set, grouped by reason for exclusion. ### Timed urine collections — different specimen (timed vs. spot) - *3001349 / 20624-3 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in 24 hour Urine* - *3013539 / 25886-3 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in 24 hour Urine* - *40760461 / 57344-4 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in 2 hour Urine* - *40760463 / 57346-9 — Creatinine [Mass/volume] in 12 hour Urine* - *3040006 / 53499-0 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in 12 hour Urine* - *3041339 / 39473-4 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in 72 hour Urine* - *1002441 / 93735-9 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in 5 hour Urine* ### Excretion rates — different measurand (amount per unit time, not a concentration) - *3004239 / 2162-6 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *3014724 / 14684-5 — Creatinine [Moles/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *3027362 / 12585-6 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 2 hour Urine* - *3013280 / 12586-4 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 4 hour Urine* - *3011002 / 12587-2 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 6 hour Urine* - *3014699 / 12588-0 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 8 hour Urine* - *3021126 / 12589-8 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 12 hour Urine* - *3010529 / 16689-2 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 48 hour Urine* - *3027111 / 16690-0 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 72 hour Urine* - *40762091 / 58998-6 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 18 hour Urine* - *1002338 / 93733-4 — Creatinine [Mass/time] in 5 hour Urine* - *3045443 / 33798-0 — Creatinine [Moles/time] in 2 hour Urine* - *3042112 / 51592-4 — Creatinine [Moles/time] in 12 hour Urine* - *3040510 / 53120-2 — Creatinine [Moles/time] in 1 hour Urine* - *1002191 / 93734-2 — Creatinine [Moles/time] in 5 hour Urine* - *1988208 / 99384-0 — Creatinine [Moles/time] in 6 hour Urine* - *3015872 / 32543-1 — Creatinine [Molar amount] in Urine collected for unspecified duration* - *3032932 / 35262-5 — Creatinine [Mass or Moles] in 24 hour Urine* - *43055681 / 72821-2 — Creatinine [Mass/time] by Calculated in Urine collected for unspecified duration* ### Ratios — different measurand (ratio to another analyte) - *3008392 / 16285-9 — Creatinine/Protein [Mass Ratio] in Urine* - *3045571 / 44716-9 — Creatinine/Calcium [Mass Ratio] in Urine* - *3036094 / 35654-3 — Creatinine/Body weight [Mass/kg/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *40757505 / 54374-4 — Creatinine/Body weight [Moles/kg/time] in 24 hour Urine* ### Qualitative — different measurand (interpretation, not a concentration) - *3007081 / 20511-2 — Creatinine [Interpretation] in Urine* ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "urinary creatinine", "urine Cr", "urine creatinine", "spot urine creatinine" without further specification: `3009508 / 14683-7 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine`. By far the most common LOINC code. - **Source reports a 24-hour (or other timed) urine collection**: do **not** map to this concept set. Timed urinary creatinine is out of scope. - **Source reports an analyte-to-creatinine ratio** (e.g. albumin/creatinine, protein/creatinine): do **not** map to this concept set. Those ratios are captured separately. - **Do not confuse with**: creatinine in blood (separate concept set, "Creatinine in blood"), creatinine excretion rate (mmol/24h), analyte/creatinine ratios. ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 14683-7 — Creatinine [Moles/volume] in Urine. Available: https://loinc.org/14683-7/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
